records.title: Phase 5 baseline had no machine-readable friction source
records.promptIntent: Design a flexible and scalable continuous improvement engine for workspace-kit.
records.frictionObserved: Friction insights and metrics were maintained mostly in markdown prose and manual YAML notes.
records.proposedChange: Adopt schema-backed improvement log plus deterministic generated summary and CI enforcement.

disposition.notes: Implemented in T168 and verified via T169 release-readiness evidence pass.

records.title: First release-cycle evidence pass captured with zero new medium/high findings
records.promptIntent: Prove the machine-readable improvement loop runs in a full release-readiness cycle.
records.frictionObserved: No additional friction surfaced in the first release-cycle evidence pass.
records.proposedChange: Maintain current policy and continue tracking next cycle signal quality.

disposition.notes: Evidence captured; proceed to Phase 5 -> 6 promotion closeout planning.
